allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Address review: clean imports, doc comment, translate, formatting

- Remove redundant Mathlib imports \(covered by ProblemImports\)
- Use doc comment `/--` with LaTeX backtick notation
- Translate German comment to English
- Remove extra blank line before abbrev SL4
- Move `by` to same line as `:=`
EOF
\)")
